title: Smile, Brother, Smile
writer: Dwinelle Benthall, Al Boasberg, Rufus McCosh
actors: Jack Mulhall, Dorothy Mackaill, Philo McCullough
plot: A hot young salesman at a cosmetics company finds out that he might soon be out of a job because the company is losing a lot of money. He and his secretary discover that the reason the company's losing money isn't because of poor ...
